creator: rambiusparkisanius@gmail.com
text:
I created a new port called nbc in category lang. NBC is the programming language for Lego Mindstorm NXT robot and lang/nbc port contains a compiler for it. The official home page of this compiler is http://bricxcc.sourceforge.net/nbc/ and I will be the maintainer of its FreeBSD port.

Fix: I am attachin the output of 

shar `find nbc`

as described in the Porter's Handbook

Patch attached with submission follows:
